summary: Backend-only testing for PDF storage app. Built pytest suite covering auth + documents (upload, list, filter, file stream, update, delete, admin seed). All 26/26 tests passed against the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.

minor.issue: Returns 401 for both 'unknown user' and 'wrong password' with same generic detail (good for security) — no issue, just noted.
FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event handlers; migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.

CORS allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per spec (browsers ignore credentials with wildcard); since this app uses Bearer tokens not cookies it is harmless, but tighten origins for production.
categorize_filename uses simple substring match; collision risk if a filename contains both keywords (e.g. 'monthly return forwarding letter ...') — first match wins, OK for current scope.
extract_month_year regex matches any 3-9 letter token + digits; could mis-extract from non-month words. Acceptable given current dataset, but consider stricter month validation.
Single 388-line server.py is fine now; consider splitting into auth/, documents/ modules if more features arrive.
seed_data_creation: Tests upload TEST_-prefixed PDFs and clean them up via DELETE in fixture teardown. No leftover test data expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses JWT Bearer tokens (NOT cookies). Public URL is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). All 22 testable behaviors from the request validated. Auto-categorization, month/year regex extraction (Feb'2026, Feb'26), category override, file streaming without auth, admin-only mutations, and FS cleanup on delete all work correctly.
verified_behaviors: Login success returns access_token + bearer + user{role:admin}
GET /auth/me with Bearer token -> 200 (no password_hash leaked)
Upload monthly return Feb'2026.pdf -> MONTHLY_RETURN, year 2026, month 2
DELETE removes both DB record and file at /app/backend/uploads/{id}.pdf
Category override during upload works (overrides filename detection)
Admin seed runs (admin@example.com login succeeds with role=admin)
